'''shoshadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphophyllous|xiphophyllous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphophyllous|xiphophyllous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shoshadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoshadhithi|shoshadhithi]] || [[word:shoshadhiji|shoshadhiji]] || [[word:shoshadhishi|shoshadhishi]] || [[word:shoshadhiki|shoshadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoshadhuthuthu|shoshadhuthuthu]] || [[word:shoshadhujuju|shoshadhujuju]] || [[word:shoshadhushushu|shoshadhushushu]] || [[word:shoshadhukuku|shoshadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoshadhuthu|shoshadhuthu]] || [[word:shoshadhuju|shoshadhuju]] || [[word:shoshadhushu|shoshadhushu]] || [[word:shoshadhuku|shoshadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoshadhufthuf|shoshadhufthuf]] || [[word:shoshadhufjuf|shoshadhufjuf]] || [[word:shoshadhufshuf|shoshadhufshuf]] || [[word:shoshadhufkuf|shoshadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoshadhethe|shoshadhethe]] || [[word:shoshadheje|shoshadheje]] || [[word:shoshadheshe|shoshadheshe]] || [[word:shoshadheke|shoshadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoshadhothotho|shoshadhothotho]] || [[word:shoshadhojojo|shoshadhojojo]] || [[word:shoshadhoshosho|shoshadhoshosho]] || [[word:shoshadhokoko|shoshadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoshadhotho|shoshadhotho]] || [[word:shoshadhojo|shoshadhojo]] || [[word:shoshadhosho|shoshadhosho]] || [[word:shoshadhoko|shoshadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoshadhofthof|shoshadhofthof]] || [[word:shoshadhofjof|shoshadhofjof]] || [[word:shoshadhofshof|shoshadhofshof]] || [[word:shoshadhofkof|shoshadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfthĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfjĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfshĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfkĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfthĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfjĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfshĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfkĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfthĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfjĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfshĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŻfkĂŻf|shoshadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŠthĂŠ|shoshadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŠjĂŠ|shoshadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŠshĂŠ|shoshadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shoshadhĂŠkĂŠ|shoshadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoshadhathatha|shoshadhathatha]] || [[word:shoshadhajaja|shoshadhajaja]] || [[word:shoshadhashasha|shoshadhashasha]] || [[word:shoshadhakaka|shoshadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoshadhatha|shoshadhatha]] || [[word:shoshadhaja|shoshadhaja]] || [[word:shoshadhasha|shoshadhasha]] || [[word:shoshadhaka|shoshadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoshadhafthaf|shoshadhafthaf]] || [[word:shoshadhafjaf|shoshadhafjaf]] || [[word:shoshadhafshaf|shoshadhafshaf]] || [[word:shoshadhafkaf|shoshadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shoshadhasha|shoshadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shoshadhshĂ«sha|shoshadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shoshadhrosha|shoshadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shoshadhmusha|shoshadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shoshadhyasha|shoshadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshoshadhnkshĂ«sha|goshoshadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshoshadhnkrosha|goshoshadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshoshadhnkmusha|goshoshadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshoshadhnkyasha|goshoshadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shoshashadhasha|shoshashadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shoshashadhshĂ«sha|shoshashadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shoshashadhrosha|shoshashadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shoshashadhmusha|shoshashadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shoshashadhyasha|shoshashadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshoshashadhnkshĂ«sha|goshoshashadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshoshashadhnkrosha|goshoshashadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshoshashadhnkmusha|goshoshashadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshoshashadhnkyasha|goshoshashadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:sheshĂŠdhasha|sheshĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sheshĂŠdhshĂ«sha|sheshĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sheshĂŠdhrosha|sheshĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sheshĂŠdhmusha|sheshĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sheshĂŠdhyasha|sheshĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosheshĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gosheshĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosheshĂŠdhnkrosha|gosheshĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosheshĂŠdhnkmusha|gosheshĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosheshĂŠdhnkyasha|gosheshĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shoshfadhasha|shoshfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shoshfadhshĂ«sha|shoshfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shoshfadhrosha|shoshfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shoshfadhmusha|shoshfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shoshfadhyasha|shoshfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshoshfadhnkshĂ«sha|goshoshfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshoshfadhnkrosha|goshoshfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshoshfadhnkmusha|goshoshfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshoshfadhnkyasha|goshoshfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
